description_long: This is a large, robust elephant with a thick, wrinkled gray hide and a heavyset body. Its most striking features are the long, curved tusks that extend outward and upward from its face, and its large, fan-shaped ears that are slightly splayed. Sparse, coarse hair is visible on the top of its head and along its back, while its trunk is long and flexible, hanging down in front. The legs are thick and pillar-like, supporting its massive frame, and the tail is relatively short with a tuft of hair at the end. The overall appearance is that of a mature African elephant, with realistic skin texture and anatomical proportions.
description: A large, gray African elephant with long, curved tusks, wrinkled skin, and prominent ears. Its body is robust and lifelike, with detailed textures and a short, tufted tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the elephant's body, both tusks, trunk, and tail clearly visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the broad head, both tusks, trunk, and large ears facing forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the trunk and tusks in profile, showing the body and tail from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded back, hind legs, and short tail with a tuft of hair.
